reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tWa1MyWmlXbkJXV0hWZlRuRm5lRVZGZUZSUGNtYxAB

reviews.comment:
Es un lugar antiguo es hermosa la estructura combina con la falda Pero detrás por la calle que te lleva al escenario principal dexla avenida eden donde hay espectáculos gratis.....hay una plazoleta muy limpia y linda Pero importante e imposible permanece ahí por el olor a gas o nafta es terrible hasta diría q obviamente no prendan un cigarrillo y eso q hablo q está por detrás .

(Translated by Google)
It's an old place, the structure is beautiful and blends in with the hillside. But behind it, on the street that leads to the main stage on Eden Avenue where there are free shows... there's a very clean and pretty little plaza. But importantly, it's impossible to stay there because of the terrible smell of gas or gasoline. I'd even say that you obviously shouldn't light a cigarette, and I'm talking about the area behind it.
